---
title: "Jordan Chong"
image: \assets\avatar.jpg # Ensure this file exists!
image-alt: "Jordan Chong"

# --- FEATURED PROJECTS CONFIG ---
listing:
  contents: projects
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  # This makes the grid ONLY show projects with the 'featured' category
  include:
    categories: featured

# --- HERO SECTION CONFIG ---
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 15em
  image-shape: round
  id: hero-heading
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jordan-chong-88a02b172/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/jordanchongja
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jordanchongjian25@gmail.com
    # DIRECT PDF LINK (Best for Recruiters)
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: /assets/Jordan_Chong_CV.pdf # Make sure this file exists
      target: _blank # Opens in new tab

# --- PAGE SETTINGS ---
page-layout: full
toc: false # Disabled because the page is short
comments: false
body-class: "homepage-view" # <--- ADD THIS
---

<style>
  .about-entity img {
    object-position: 0 20%; /* Adjust this to nudge the crop */
  }
</style>

:::{#hero-heading}


Hi! I'm Jordan. I am a recent graduate of Singapore Management University (SMU) with a Bachelor of Business Management with a double major in Finance and Data Science & Analytics. 

I'm highly interested in roles at the intersection of markets, data, and technology—specifically within quantitative finance, equity derivatives, and digital assets trading. 

Currently, I am expanding my knowledge in market microstructure, stochastic control, and volatility modeling, while building simulation engines and replicating academic frameworks like the Avellaneda-Stoikov model.

:::

::: {.featured-header-row style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; margin-top: 20px;"}
<div style="font-size: 1.6rem; font-weight: bold; margin-bottom: 0;">Featured Projects</div>

[View all projects &rarr;](projects/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::{#featured-projects}
:::


```{=html}
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const badges = document.querySelectorAll('.listing-category');

    badges.forEach(badge => {
      badge.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        // Stop the click from triggering the project card link
        e.stopPropagation();
        e.preventDefault();

        // Use textContent instead of innerText to ignore CSS uppercase styling
        const category = badge.textContent.trim();
        
        // Redirect to the projects page with the correct casing
        window.location.href = '/projects/#category=' + encodeURIComponent(category);
      });
    });
  });
</script>
